summary: App ComfyUI bump 0.19.3 → 0.25.0 (5ef0092 / frontend 1.45.15). Depends on MPI-117 lock. RunPod branch only.

Retargeted to NAMED release v0.25.1 (SHA eca4757, frontend 1.45.15 auto-pinned via requirements.txt). Source of truth = release, not local machine (local rig mid-fix, being reinstalled fresh from v0.25.1).
Added CUDA-build guard: do NOT bump images to cu130 (data-center driver lag); lock ComfyUI v0.25.1 core+frontend+nodes only, CUDA stays per-environment.

CORRECTED stale cu130 claim: USER reports live Pods show CUDA 13.0 (driver ≥580) so cu130 would boot; reason to keep cu128 is COVERAGE (≥570 vs cu130 ≥580), not driver-age. Added TODO: live nvidia-smi confirmation (user-only op).

Added IMAGE REBUILD REQUIRED section: MPI-117 rebuild deferred + batched here; after MPI-118 edits, bump node_lock.json to v0.25.1 targets + run /build-pod-image as v0.5.0; MPI-117 closes with this combined rebuild.
